title: Phymatopteris nigropaleacea
taxonomy: Phymatopteris nigropaleacea is classified within the family Polypodiaceae, which is a family of ferns that are commonly known as spleenworts. This fern is a member of the genus Phymatopteris, which is a group of ferns that are typically found in tropical regions. The genus Phymatopteris is further classified within the order Polypodiales, which is a large and diverse group of ferns. Within the order Polypodiales, Phymatopteris nigropaleacea is part of the subclass Polypodiidae, which includes ferns with simple leaves. Further classification places Phymatopteris nigropaleacea within the class Polypodiopsida, which is a group of ferns that are characterized by their vascular tissues and photosynthetic abilities.
